Yeah.
Fathom captures that.
And Nannick.
You flag this for me.
But I like to have like mini dossiers on like who the hell matters, right?
Like, when you're in that conversation, you have to convince somebody, like who are you convincing, you know?
So if it's Maddie or Megan?
So the leader of the project is Megan.
Approval idea, though, I think would be Chris and Megan.
Chris Kent and Megan.
Cool.
Sounds good.
Thank you.
All right.
Thanks.
See you.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the handover of Metronome account management and align on required documentation and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sydney to provide comprehensive documentation on Metronome's content processes, deliverables, and team structure](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Weekly Metronome sync scheduled for Tuesday at 1 PM; Matthew to lead next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Need to develop automated workflow for processing client feedback and updating writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Metronome's content strategy shifting post-white paper launch; ideation for new content clusters required](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)

## Topics

### Metronome Account Handover Requirements

  - [List of deliverables with raw numbers and due dates](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Article generation process details, including specific pipelines used](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Outline generation and review process explanation](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Social media post requirements and voice guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Current status of artifacts and outlines](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Team overview and important links](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Step-by-step publishing checklist](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Content Generation and Review Process

  - [Outline deadline: Friday morning](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Article deadline: Friday morning (prefer two-a-day cadence, completed by Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Client provides extensive feedback via comments](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [No need to re-submit revised outlines; team can proceed with changes](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Chris Carter handles corresponding image selection](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Scrunch dashboard set up for Metronome](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [Aida walked the client through the dashboard last week](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Matthew to determine ongoing reporting strategy](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)

### Post-White Paper Content Strategy

  - [Current content ideas approved only until next week](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [\~20 ideas available for future content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [New ideation process needed for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)

### Key Stakeholders at Metronome

  - [Chris Kent: Main point of contact for Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1993.0)
  - [Megan Laflamme: Project leader](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Chang and Maggie: Editing](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
  - [Stephanie and Maddie: Social media](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [Chris Kent and Megan Laflamme: Idea approval](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)

### Automation Opportunities

  - [Develop workflow to automate processing of client feedback and updating writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Create pipeline to ingest Google Drive comments and output updated artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to compile and share comprehensive Metronome account documentation](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Matthew to lead next week's Metronome sync call](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Develop automated workflow for processing client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Plan for post-white paper content ideation and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Nana to review provided documentation and prepare for account takeover](https://fathom.video/share/oY55VcyuNLQasmszw-4-jWBgY4___apK?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

action_items.description: Create ticket for automating Google Doc comment collation process, include current manual steps
Record Loom video (~1.5min) explaining Metronome pipeline specifics
Create Metronome handover doc (deliverables, pipelines, processes, artifacts status, generation details for articles/outlines/social posts)
Lead tomorrow's 1pm Metronome weekly sync, introduce self as new lead
